reasoning: Based on recent news up to October 24, 2025, the 'Coalition of the Willing' reassurance force is explicitly conditional upon a peace agreement or ceasefire to end the ongoing Russia-Ukraine war. As of late October 2025, talks are still in preliminary stages regarding starting points for negotiations, and no comprehensive peace deal has been signed. Even if a peace agreement were signed immediately, deploying a multinational force of 15,000 to 20,000+ troops across Ukraine would take months of complex logistical planning and execution, making a deployment before December 31, 2025 highly implausible. Furthermore, recent statements by the coalition leadership center on long-term funding for 2026-2027 and winter support, with no indication of imminent military deployment. The community forecast of 1% accurately reflects the negligible chances of this occurring in the remaining two months of the year.
